TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: i lililisen nu kamu , mikilim tu zaza ataluma'‚ÄĒu balucu'ay nu mikeliday pecu' nu lacul u nabalucu'an ni Tuku Sayuen namakay misakakawaw tu pabalucu'an-kawaw nu kamu nu Sakizaya i 2018 a mihcaan. sapuelac uyniyan a pabalucu'an-kakaw asapauzip tu kamu nu Sakizaya, palekal i lalud nu 2016 a mihcaan. natayni ci Lin atu Huang tusa a saydan, mitingil tu kalas atu sining nu niyazu'. malihalaw ku balucu' nu maku, zayhan anu caay malaheci tina kawaw i tulu a mihcaan, amalawpestu ku kamu nu Sakizaya. i lalingatuan tina kawaw, caaykatepa tu saydan atu micudaday, inayi' ku kaydihan a tademaw nu misakakawaway . tina pabalucu'an-kawaw tadamaan a satangahan sa, u apasubana'ay a saydan atu aminanamay a micudaday. uzuma a satangahan sa, u minanamay-dabek atu misabaluhay . musepi satu, sazikuzay sa, izawtu ku saydan,micudaday atu misakakawaway tayni. mikukay kami tu tuas nu mita. yadah ku aminanamay a sapicudad , izaw ku lalay, nazipaan, lalangawan, kagak, misabaluhayay, sasulitan, ulic, natingenan atu zuma. caay kadayum tina kawaw, yadah ku sasadakayan . tinaku: macacihi kami tu tina kawaw; mautang ku kalisiw nu kuwanan , sisa lihalaw atu malalum ku balucu'; caay katatudung tu baluhayay a sapicudad; mainal tu laculaculan atu katahkalan nu kalisiw . uyzasa, izawtu ku kalimulakan a kawaw. itiza i da'cusay a zazan, haymaw hanita muculil. u sazikuzay a pamutekan tuyniyan a kawaw sa, maydih kami mucelak tu padutusay a binacadan tademaw. maydih aca kami, anucila sa, taneng kita patizeng tu hecek nu pasubana'ay a kawaw nu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: i r~…ĺir~…ĺir~…ĺis…ôn nu kamu , mikir~…ĺim tu zaza atar~…ĺuma Ē~ °*u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj p…ô ¶u Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an ni tuku saju…ôn namakaj misakakawaw tu pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an-kawaw nu kamu nu sakizaja i **** a mińß ¶aan. sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ujnijan a pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an-kakaw asapauzip tu kamu nu sakizaja, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ i r~…ĺar~…ĺud nu **** a mińß ¶aan. natajni ¶i r~…ĺin atu ńßuaŇč tusa a sajdan, mitiŇčir~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺas atu siniŇč nu nijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu maku, zajńßan anu ¶aaj mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tina kawaw i tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan, amar~…ĺawp…ôstu ku kamu nu sakizaja. i r~…ĺar~…ĺiŇčatuan tina kawaw, ¶aajkat…ôpa tu sajdan atu mi ¶udadaj, inaji Ē~ ° ku kajdińßan a tad…ômaw nu misakakawawaj . tina pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an-kawaw tadamaan a sataŇčańßan sa, u apasubana Ē~ °aj a sajdan atu aminanamaj a mi ¶udadaj. uzuma a sataŇčańßan sa, u minanamaj-dab…ôk atu misabar~…ĺuńßaj . mus…ôpi satu, sazikuzaj sa, izawtu ku sajdan,mi ¶udadaj atu misakakawawaj tajni. mikukaj kami tu tuas nu mita. jadańß ku aminanamaj a sapi ¶udad , izaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaj, nazipaan, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, kagak, misabar~…ĺuńßajaj, sasur~…ĺitan, ur~…ĺi ¶, natiŇč…ônan atu zuma. ¶aaj kadajum tina kawaw, jadańß ku sasadakajan . tinaku: ma ¶a ¶ińßi kami tu tina kawaw; mautaŇč ku kar~…ĺisiw nu kuwanan , sisa r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺum ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °; ¶aaj katatuduŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßajaj a sapi ¶udad; mainar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu katańßkar~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺisiw . ujzasa, izawtu ku kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a kawaw. itiza i da Ē~ ° ¶usaj a zazan, ńßajmaw ńßanita mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. u sazikuzaj a pamut…ôkan tujnijan a kawaw sa, majdińß kami mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak tu padutusaj a bina ¶adan tad…ômaw. majdińß a ¶a kami, anu ¶ir~…ĺa sa, tan…ôŇč kita patiz…ôŇč tu ńß…ô ¶…ôk nu pasubana Ē~ °aj a kawaw nu sakizaja.
S.FORM: i lililisen nu kamu , mikilim tu zaza ataluma'‚ÄĒu balucu'ay nu mikeliday pecu' nu lacul u nabalucu'an ni Tuku Sayuen namakay misakakawaw tu pabalucu'an-kawaw nu kamu nu Sakizaya i 2018 a mihcaan. sapuelac uyniyan a pabalucu'an-kakaw asapauzip tu kamu nu Sakizaya, palekal i lalud nu 2016 a mihcaan. natayni ci Lin atu Huang tusa a saydan, mitingil tu kalas atu sining nu niyazu'. malihalaw ku balucu' nu maku, zayhan anu caay malaheci tina kawaw i tulu a mihcaan, amalawpestu ku kamu nu Sakizaya. i lalingatuan tina kawaw, caaykatepa tu saydan atu micudaday, inayi' ku kaydihan a tademaw nu misakakawaway . tina pabalucu'an-kawaw tadamaan a satangahan sa, u apasubana'ay a saydan atu aminanamay a micudaday. uzuma a satangahan sa, u minanamay-dabek atu misabaluhay . musepi satu, sazikuzay sa, izawtu ku saydan,micudaday atu misakakawaway tayni. mikukay kami tu tuas nu mita. yadah ku aminanamay a sapicudad , izaw ku lalay, nazipaan, lalangawan, kagak, misabaluhayay, sasulitan, ulic, natingenan atu zuma. caay kadayum tina kawaw, yadah ku sasadakayan . tinaku: macacihi kami tu tina kawaw; mautang ku kalisiw nu kuwanan , sisa lihalaw atu malalum ku balucu'; caay katatudung tu baluhayay a sapicudad; mainal tu laculaculan atu katahkalan nu kalisiw . uyzasa, izawtu ku kalimulakan a kawaw. itiza i da'cusay a zazan, haymaw hanita muculil. u sazikuzay a pamutekan tuyniyan a kawaw sa, maydih kami mucelak tu padutusay a binacadan tademaw. maydih aca kami, anucila sa, taneng kita patizeng tu hecek nu pasubana'ay a kawaw nu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: i r~…ĺir~…ĺir~…ĺis…ôn nu kamu , mikir~…ĺim tu zaza atar~…ĺuma Ē~ °*u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj p…ô ¶u Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an ni tuku saju…ôn namakaj misakakawaw tu pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an-kawaw nu kamu nu sakizaja i **** a mińß ¶aan. sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ujnijan a pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an-kakaw asapauzip tu kamu nu sakizaja, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ i r~…ĺar~…ĺud nu **** a mińß ¶aan. natajni ¶i r~…ĺin atu ńßuaŇč tusa a sajdan, mitiŇčir~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺas atu siniŇč nu nijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu maku, zajńßan anu ¶aaj mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tina kawaw i tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan, amar~…ĺawp…ôstu ku kamu nu sakizaja. i r~…ĺar~…ĺiŇčatuan tina kawaw, ¶aajkat…ôpa tu sajdan atu mi ¶udadaj, inaji Ē~ ° ku kajdińßan a tad…ômaw nu misakakawawaj . tina pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an-kawaw tadamaan a sataŇčańßan sa, u apasubana Ē~ °aj a sajdan atu aminanamaj a mi ¶udadaj. uzuma a sataŇčańßan sa, u minanamaj-dab…ôk atu misabar~…ĺuńßaj . mus…ôpi satu, sazikuzaj sa, izawtu ku sajdan,mi ¶udadaj atu misakakawawaj tajni. mikukaj kami tu tuas nu mita. jadańß ku aminanamaj a sapi ¶udad , izaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaj, nazipaan, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, kagak, misabar~…ĺuńßajaj, sasur~…ĺitan, ur~…ĺi ¶, natiŇč…ônan atu zuma. ¶aaj kadajum tina kawaw, jadańß ku sasadakajan . tinaku: ma ¶a ¶ińßi kami tu tina kawaw; mautaŇč ku kar~…ĺisiw nu kuwanan , sisa r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺum ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °; ¶aaj katatuduŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßajaj a sapi ¶udad; mainar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu katańßkar~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺisiw . ujzasa, izawtu ku kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a kawaw. itiza i da Ē~ ° ¶usaj a zazan, ńßajmaw ńßanita mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. u sazikuzaj a pamut…ôkan tujnijan a kawaw sa, majdińß kami mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak tu padutusaj a bina ¶adan tad…ômaw. majdińß a ¶a kami, anu ¶ir~…ĺa sa, tan…ôŇč kita patiz…ôŇč tu ńß…ô ¶…ôk nu pasubana Ē~ °aj a kawaw nu sakizaja.
